texto: Not knowing trauma or experiencing or remembering it in a dissociative way is not a passive shutdown of perception or of memory. Not knowing is rather an active, persistent, violent refusal; an erasure, a destruction of form and of representation. The fundamental essence of the death instinct, the instinct that destroys all psychic structure is apparent in this phenomenon. . . . The death drive is against knowing and against the developing of knowledge and elaborating [it].
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dori Laub sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Not knowing trauma or experiencing or remembering it in a dissociative way is not a passive shutd…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, dissociation, dissociative, útil em momentos de luto e dissociative.
